calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir S. Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Richard Powell Bowman, Jr., who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Ray Oil Burner Company, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on May 20, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed September 9, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed August 31, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Joe L. Bullock and Joe Lozano, and against the Defaulted Defendant Ray Oil Burner Company, Inc. as follows:

Principal - $2,500.00.
Interest - $160.96.
Costs - $220.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $2,880.96.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Continued To Sep-23-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-22-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
